commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because the PR changes protocol defaults, raw transcript access, and session persistence, and contributor current-head real behavior proof is still required.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete sensitive-data risk in chat.send fallback transcript events because raw user content can bypass before_message_write before reaching transcript listeners.; Review finding: [P1] Persist fall... (sha=78491c7255ed570fc6c31865add4700f6800d086)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded chat.history display projections and messages/turns/raw-messages modes, updates WebChat to request turns, changes chat.send transcript update handling, regenerates Swift protocol models, updates docs, and adds focused tests plus a package-list script fix.

PR surface: Source +1052, Tests +904, Docs +3, Other +43. Total +2002 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regression: source inspection shows fallback user-turn handling now calls only emitSessionTranscriptUpdate, while that helper only notifies listeners and does not persist or apply before_message_write. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR changes protocol defaults, raw transcript access, and session persistence, and contributor current-head real behavior proof is still required.

target.title: AI-assisted: fix(chat): bound chat history display payloads
target.body:
## Summary

Supersedes #86458 with a fresh branch on the current `release/2026.5.26` head so CI and automated review evaluate one clean evidence chain.

This fixes `chat.history` display payload growth by routing normal display responses through bounded, safe projections while preserving raw transcript access only through explicit admin `raw-messages` mode.

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and replacement PR publication using OpenAI Codex `gpt-5.5` in the OpenClaw workspace. Operator requested the old PR be closed and replaced after the review state on #86458 became stale.

## Current Branch Evidence

- Base: current `origin/release/2026.5.26` at `13436ca463`
- Head: `ded71ef0eda2a46b20d8682a9e7a6a0e63197eee`
- Scope: 8 commits, 17 files
- Dependency churn: none in package, lockfile, or shrinkwrap files

## Validation

```bash
git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.26...HEAD
pnpm vitest run \
  src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts \
  src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts \
  src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts \
  test/scripts/list-prod-store-packages.test.ts \
  ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts \
  ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts \
  --reporter=dot
```

Observed result:

```text
git diff --check: PASS
Test Files: 8 passed
Tests: 401 passed
```

## Behavior Covered

- Adds bounded chat display projection helpers for text, tool payloads, media, and canvas blocks.
- Routes normal `chat.history` display responses through bounded projections.
- Adds and documents `mode: "messages" | "turns" | "raw-messages"`.
- Gates raw payload inspection behind explicit admin raw mode.
- Keeps `unsafeRawToolPayloads` schema-compatible without allowing it to bypass safe `messages` projection.
- Preserves safe `messages` mode text up to configured `maxHistoryBytes` after tool payload omission.
- Regenerates Swift protocol models from canonical schema output.
- Adds regression tests for bounded payloads, media shaping, visible turn preservation, placeholder semantics, saturated scan-window metadata, large safe text preservation, and raw-mode authorization.

## Replacement Note

#86458 is closed as superseded because repeated base movement and force-push repairs left stale review/CI context on that PR. This PR should be treated as the clean review target.
target.author: ragesaq
